scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web & bun run dev:admin & wait
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f docker/database/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker/redis/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker/storage/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.infra:down: docker compose -f docker/database/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f docker/redis/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f docker/storage/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.infra:ps: docker compose -f docker/database/docker-compose.yml ps && docker compose -f docker/redis/docker-compose.yml ps && docker compose -f docker/storage/docker-compose.yml ps
scripts.db:reset:base: bun run db:wipe-schema && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed:base
scripts.db:reset:demo: bun run db:wipe-schema && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed:demo
scripts.db:reset:mock: bun run db:wipe-schema && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed:mock
scripts.setup:deploy: bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed:base
scripts.setup:dev: bun run infra:up && bun run db:reset:demo
scripts.setup:test: bun run infra:up && bun run db:reset:mock
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/rich-text-editor typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/schemas typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/http-client typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/admin typecheck
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --config ./vitest.config.ts packages/rich-text-editor/tests/**/*.test.ts packages/shared/tests/**/*.test.ts packages/schemas/tests/**/*.test.ts packages/http-client/tests/**/*.test.ts packages/db/tests/**/*.test.ts apps/web/tests/**/*.test.ts apps/admin/tests/**/*.test.ts
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/schemas build && bun run --cwd packages/http-client build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/admin build
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
